creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: The ioat(4) driver can only be accessed from kernelspace, so it should probably be moved to section 9.  Also, the cross-referenced program ioatcontrol(8) is a dead link.  That program doesn't get installed and neither does its man page.  ioat(4) should probably just refer to its source location instead: tools/tools/dev/ioat/ioatcontrol.
